Elevation Lab AirTag 10-Year Extended Battery Case (4-Pack)

Buy for $36 (Reg. $45)

What we love

Compatible with Apple’s latest AirTag 2, these battery expansion units can also be a great way to re-purpose and put you first-gen AirTags to good use as well – a sort of set-it-and-forget-it situation, and for a good 10 years here. Samsung’s Odyssey lineup is seeing some of its best prices yet, including new lows on the 49-inch G9 and a couple of its QD-OLED models. Among all the deals we have for you from across this week, Segway has been a primary focus with its many new and ongoing EV deals that will be ending soon. First, the Myon Smart e-bike is benefiting from a $200 markdown to $1,800, but then there’s also the Max G3 Electric Scooter down at its $1,000 2026 low until tonight, the continuing Xyber e-bike and extra battery bundle getting $1,400 savings at its lowest price, and the Xafari All-Terrain Smart Cruiser e-bike at its $1,550 low. There was also the ENGWE 150-mile L16 Utility e-bike deals that start from $899, Lectric’s ongoing 250th Anniversary Sale event, and more. Likewise, for power stations, EcoFlow is bringing back Prime Day pricing during its second phase Outdoor Season Sale, while Anker’s SOLIX Summer Power Sale with exclusive sitewide savings is ending with the weekend. All these and more are waiting for you below.

Anker Nano 67W Max 6-in-1 Travel Power Strip

Buy for $32 (Reg. $40)

What we love

There are all sorts of sweet little travel MagSafe charging stations and the like out there, but often times wish I just had a mini little power strip type of thing – something with actual AC plugs and some USB action too – and that’s exactly what we have here. Be it a hotel room or over at someone’s house, it can sometimes be a little be cumbersome to locate some extra plugs, but you’ll only need one to get this thing rolling.
